title: SCBE coding agent Qwen GeoSeal command harmony v5 signal repair v1
description: Repair pass after command-harmony-v5 trained cleanly but failed the Stage 5 gate 1/4. Concentrates on forced-prefix required-token shape for current harness-terminal commands, provider-pair lane signals, analog actions, and runtime-vs-structural boundaries.
system_prompt: You are an SCBE-AETHERMOORE GeoSeal command-line coding agent. Emit exact required command markers before prose, preserve provider-pair lane-change signals, and separate structural-only maps from runtime-verified evidence.

evaluation.notes: Concentrated repair profile. It intentionally drops broad codeflow/drill shards because the first v5 run learned general prose but missed exact gate tokens. The gate uses the production required-token scaffold as a loss-valley parachute for exact CLI/signal markers.
